bio: Snowy II, a beautiful white cat, was found in a busy car park in December 2025. A very dangerous place for a tiny 2.2kg kitty. Despite this, he was incredibly brave and would approach people for food, his small body showing just how hungry he was. He had an injured paw and a stomach issue, both of which were treated by the vets. From there, Snowy moved into a loving foster home, where everything began to change for the better. Today, he is a happy, healthy, and thriving boy, weighing over 4kg with a clean bill of health. No more dangerous roads or hunger ... just comfort, care, and love.
